mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment (user_id, order_id, payment_method, amount, status, refund_reason, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{refundReason}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_payment SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
UPDATE t_payment SET transaction_id = #{transactionId}, channel_code = #{channelCode}, channel_message = #{channelMessage}, status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, user_id, order_id, payment_method, amount, status, transaction_id, channel_code, channel_message, refund_amount, refund_status, refund_reason, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM t_payment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
